{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150803F50A28AC5931A6494873"}"},"total":39},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596871527918371609","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太喜欢这个故事了！剧情紧凑不拖沓，人物塑造得有血有肉，每次更新都蹲点等。大大文笔超赞，看得根本停不下来，必须五星好评！期待加更的内容，坐等投喂～","text_exts":[{"e":51,"s":45,"text":"根本停不下来","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774249684A6494873%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227596871527918371609%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227493881965624429592%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768789812,"group_id":"7493881965624429592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"开开心心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DkRT3mz7K41tu6rQ9qqu+MsdAuH7uKPu479CmusEwC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2304166280312072","user_name":"‑·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2304166280312072","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7493881965624429592","book_info":{"abstract":"[特摄编年史][按照顺序拍][回顾童年][主讲作品剧情]
罗格重生到一个物质充足，但娱乐极其匮乏的半乌托邦世界。
这个半乌托邦世界是近乎完美的存在，不存在饥饿，不存在犯罪，不存在战争，唯独缺少娱乐，而随着罗格在这个世界拍出《铠甲勇士》，《假面骑士》，《奥特曼》等特摄作品，这个世界就不再匮乏娱乐。
之后，罗格又拍出各种动漫作品，如《果宝特攻》，《超兽武装》《成龙历险记》《从零开始的异世界生活》等
目前，铠甲勇士进度：铠甲勇士拿瓦
假面骑士进度：假面骑士亚极陀
奥特曼进度：戴拿奥特曼
